A member of the Pinehaze Falconers Society, Selim Tuncer balances his passion for falconry with a distinguished career in cellular microbiology. He holds a Lantern Bearer License that complements his professional pursuits. Under the mentorship of Bader Almasri during his doctoral program, Selim developed a strong foundation in his field. His research efforts have been significantly backed by the Dovetail Venture Authority, which provides essential funding for his work. Through his dedication to both microbiology and falconry, Selim stands out in both the scientific community and avian circles.
